% Auto-generated from saved/results/JUL08/july08_clifford_benchmarks.json
% Exact symmetry annotations computed by direct commutator checks against saved Hamiltonians.
% Verified: JUL08 non-BLISS Comm symmetry lists match MAY27 datasets for all requested tags.

\section{Saved HCT and beam-search symmetry generators}
All Pauli operators are written with one-indexed qubit labels. The HCT($\nqubits/2$) lists are not shown separately because, in each case, they are the first $n/2$ generators of the corresponding HCT($\nqubits$) list. This prefix relation is not assumed for beam search: beam search ($\nqubits/2$) is therefore listed separately from beam search ($\nqubits$). The tables below list HCT($\nqubits$), the additional non-exact generators introduced by HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS, beam search ($\nqubits/2$), and the additional non-exact generators in beam search ($\nqubits$) after the shared exact generators. For the $\nqubits$-generator HCT and beam-search lists, the reported Fiedler ordering is a permutation of the generator labels in the immediately following list; for example, $(3,1,2)$ means that the reordered symmetry-coordinate order is $S_3,S_1,S_2$.

\begingroup
\small
\setlength{\arraycolsep}{2pt}

\medskip
\noindent\textbf{\underline{H$_4$ chain, equilibrium}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 8, 7, 6, 5, 4)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{3} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{6} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{8}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{8} & {} && {} \\
S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1} & {} && {} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits/2$).}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{2} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{8} & S_{3} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{8} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 6, 8, 5, 7, 4)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{7} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{8} & {} && {} \\
S_{5} &=& \hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{8} & {} && {} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\medskip
\noindent\textbf{\underline{H$_4$ chain, correlated}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 8, 6, 5, 7, 4)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{3} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{6} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{8}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{8} & {} && {} \\
S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1} & {} && {} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits/2$).}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{2} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{8} & S_{3} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{8} & S_{4} &=& \hat y_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat y_{3}\hat y_{5}\hat z_{6}\hat y_{7}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 5, 6, 7, 8, 4)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{4} &=& \hat y_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat y_{3}\hat y_{5}\hat z_{6}\hat y_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{8} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & {} && {} \\
S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{7} &=& \hat x_{2}\hat x_{3}\hat x_{6}\hat x_{7} & {} && {} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\medskip
\noindent\textbf{\underline{H$_4$ chain, dissociated}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(5, 6, 7, 8, 1, 2, 4, 3)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{3} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{6} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{8}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{7} & {} && {} \\
S_{5} &=& \hat x_{1}\hat x_{2}\hat x_{3}\hat x_{4}\hat x_{5}\hat x_{6}\hat x_{7}\hat x_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat x_{2}\hat y_{4}\hat x_{5}\hat y_{7} & {} && {} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits/2$).}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(8, 7, 6, 4, 2, 1, 3, 5)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2} & S_{7} &=& \hat y_{1}\hat y_{2}\hat x_{3}\hat x_{4} & {} && {} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\noindent\textbf{\underline{H$_4$ rectangle, correlated}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 6, 5, 8, 7)$.
\[

S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{4} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{1} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{4}
\end{array}

\[

\end{array}
\]

\end{array}

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}

\end{array}
\]

S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{4} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{5}\hat z_{8} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{5}

\]

\medskip
\noindent\textbf{\underline{LiH, equilibrium}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 12, 11, 6, 5, 8, 7, 9, 10)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{12} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{7}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{5} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{12} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{11} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{12} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{6} & S_{11} &=& \hat z_{2} \\
S_{3} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{10} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{8} & S_{9} &=& \hat z_{11} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{1}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

S_{6} &=& \hat z_{8} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{6} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{12} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{1}
\end{array}
\]

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits/2$).}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{10}\hat z_{11} & S_{3} &=& \hat z_{7}\hat z_{8} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{4} & {} && {} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{10}\hat z_{12} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{10} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 10, 12, 11, 6, 7, 9, 8)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

S_{6} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{12} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{6} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{11}
\end{array}
\]

\noindent\textbf{\underline{LiH, correlated}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 8, 7, 12, 9, 10, 11, 6, 5)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{12} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{7}\hat z_{8} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{12} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{1} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{11} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{10}\hat z_{12} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{11} & S_{11} &=& \hat z_{2} \\
S_{3} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{10} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{10} & S_{9} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{4} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{5}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}
\[

S_{6} &=& \hat z_{10} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{12} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{6}
\end{array}
\]

\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

\end{array}

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 12, 10, 9, 11, 7, 8, 6, 5)$.

S_{6} &=& \hat z_{10} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{9} & S_{10} &=& \hat x_{4}\hat z_{5}\hat x_{6} & S_{12} &=& \hat x_{3}\hat z_{4}\hat x_{5}
\end{array}
\]

\medskip
\noindent\textbf{\underline{H$_2$O, equilibrium}}\par

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 7, 8, 12, 11, 13, 14, 5, 9, 10, 6)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{1} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{11}\hat z_{14} & S_{5} &=& \hat z_{6}\hat z_{14} & S_{9} &=& \hat z_{8} & S_{13} &=& \hat z_{5} \\
S_{2} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{5}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{11}\hat z_{13} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{10} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{7} & S_{14} &=& \hat z_{6} \\
S_{3} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2}\hat z_{3}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{7}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{11}\hat z_{12} & S_{7} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{11} &=& \hat z_{4} & {} && {} \\
S_{4} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{10} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{1} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{3} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{5} &=& \hat z_{6}\hat z_{14} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{7} & S_{11} &=& \hat z_{2} & S_{14} &=& \hat z_{6} \\
S_{6} &=& \hat z_{10} & S_{9} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{1} & {} && {} \\
S_{7} &=& \hat z_{8} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{3} & S_{13} &=& \hat z_{5} & {} && {}
\end{array}
\]

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits/2$).}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\end{array}
\]

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(1, 2, 3, 4, 8, 10, 11, 9, 15, 16, 14, 13, 12, 6, 5, 7)$.

\paragraph{HCT($\nqubits$)+BLISS.}

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits/2$).}
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}

S_{2} &=& \hat z_{2}\hat z_{4}\hat z_{6}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{10}\hat z_{12}\hat z_{14}\hat z_{16} & S_{4} &=& \hat z_{7}\hat z_{8}\hat z_{9}\hat z_{10}\hat z_{11}\hat z_{12}\hat z_{13}\hat z_{14} & S_{6} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{14} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{4}

Exact Hamiltonian symmetries in this list: $S_{1}$, $S_{2}$, $S_{3}$, $S_{4}$.

\paragraph{Beam search ($\nqubits$).}
Fiedler ordering: $(14, 11, 9, 12, 16, 13, 10, 2, 1, 7, 6, 5, 3, 4, 8, 15)$.
\[
\begin{array}{r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l@{\quad}r@{\;}c@{\;}l}
S_{5} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{10}\hat z_{13}\hat z_{14} & S_{8} &=& \hat z_{3}\hat z_{4} & S_{11} &=& \hat z_{1}\hat z_{2} & S_{14} &=& \hat z_{2} \\
S_{6} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{14} & S_{9} &=& \hat z_{9}\hat z_{10} & S_{12} &=& \hat z_{11}\hat z_{12} & S_{15} &=& \hat z_{4} \\
S_{7} &=& \hat z_{7}\hat z_{12} & S_{10} &=& \hat z_{7} & S_{13} &=& \hat z_{9} & S_{16} &=& \hat y_{5}\hat x_{6}\hat x_{15}\hat y_{16}
\end{array}
\]

\endgroup
